heading: Omitted
label: 552 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided for monetary payments to members of the Klamath Tribe who had not received an allotment of land, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act June 1, 1938, ch. 310, § 252 Stat. 605
